creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 162810
patch to take maintainership

Hello,

i will took the maintainership of this port. I asked the current maintainer if i could take the maintainership and he answered: 

> Yeah sure; I haven't seriously used FreeBSD in almost 2 years, and have
> little interest in returning to it...

Before committing this one i would like to discuss if this port is needed anymore. As far as i see it generates the plist for ports. But in my option this is already done by "make makeplist" in a more accurate way. Maybe we should remove the port? What is your opinion?
If we want to keep it, i will maintain it.

Greetings,
Torsten
